runtime_semantics: role_output_runtime validates generic checklist coverage only; reviewer, officer, and PM gates own quality-pack substance.

quality_packs.summary: Screenshots, interaction coverage, visual fit, layout, and accessible user workflow evidence for UI work.
Desktop startup, app icon, tray/taskbar, packaging, launch, and host integration evidence.
Generated images, icons, screenshots, design resources, source, consumption, supersession, or discard status.
Declared language coverage, user-visible bilingual text, fallback, and review evidence.
Visible route, state, frontier, task tab, ledger, and realtime update mapping evidence.
Source authority, direct-source checks, contradiction handling, freshness, and citation evidence.
Private data, sealed body, secret, local path, account, and public-boundary evidence.
Resume, stale evidence, superseded node, prior blocker, and continuation authority evidence.
